case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. JILL ANNE CAHILL 168130

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA SERVED NOV-20-2008, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CAHILL, JILL ANNE
